launch_policy.public_launch_means: Feature can be exposed with its launch-mode label.
launch_policy.filing_grade_auto_means: Exact official machine-readable source can be used without a tariff-line parser warning.
launch_policy.guardrail: Hybrid and monitor modes must not be marketed as fully automatic filing-grade rates.

regulatory.note: Daily official-source crawl is enabled; AI filtering and guardrails decide whether a signal is published.

duty_rates.name: United States HTS / USITC
duty_rates.current_scope: General HTS base duty for maintained HS prefixes. Additional duties such as Section 301 and AD/CVD remain separate benchmark/scope checks.
duty_rates.next_action: Keep USITC sync running before releases and monitor changes in data/duty-rates.json.
duty_rates.label: Live auto
duty_rates.note: Official machine-readable source is connected to daily sync.

duty_rates.name: China import tariff / VAT
duty_rates.current_scope: Maintained China exact-line MFN duty candidates plus 13% import VAT and product-control review reminders.
duty_rates.next_action: Replace local exact map with machine-readable China Customs tariff parser output when available; keep VAT and product-control checks refreshed.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: Germany import VAT with EU TARIC duty
duty_rates.current_scope: Hybrid Germany coverage: official TARIC candidate duty where unambiguous, TARIC scope-check where exact code is needed, and Germany VAT benchmark separately.
duty_rates.next_action: Keep using EU TARIC updater; next upgrade is exact TARIC-code input so ambiguous prefixes can resolve to one official rate.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.

duty_rates.name: EU TARIC
duty_rates.current_scope: Hybrid EU coverage: official TARIC candidate duty for unambiguous HS prefixes, scope-check status for ambiguous prefixes, and benchmark member-state VAT shown separately.
duty_rates.next_action: Continue TARIC workbook sync; promote only prefixes with one unambiguous ERGA OMNES third-country-duty rate and keep ambiguous prefixes exact-code gated.
duty_rates.label: Live hybrid
duty_rates.note: Official-linked or maintained exact map is live; exact tariff-line scope stays gated where needed.
